title: Workday Q4 2026 Earnings Analysis and Investor Presentation
description: These documents detail Workday’s fiscal year 2026 financial performance, highlighting a 14.5% increase in total revenue and significant growth in subscription-based income. The reports outline the company’s enterprise AI platform, which integrates human capital and financial management tools for diverse sectors like healthcare and government. title: Workday Q4 Earnings Breakdown: What Customers Need to Know

title: Workday (WDAY) Q4-26 earnings: Taxing AI parasites & the $130M founder shakeup
show: Earnings Unscripted: Stock Earnings Calls & Analysis
description:
Founder Aneel Bhusri returns as sole CEO in Workday's Q4 2026 print, explicitly pausing margin expansion to fund a massive pivot toward native AI agents. 

In ~10 minutes:
- The $130M restructuring charge hammering GAAP profitability 📉
- Why Q1 subscription guidance models a rare sequential decline
- Rolling out "Flex Credits" to toll third-party AI scrapers
- Pausing M&A to digest Sana Labs and build organically

The enterprise SaaS darling is suddenly playing a much more aggressive game. By fo

title: Workday, Inc. (WDAY) Announced Q4 2026 Earnings on February 24, 2026, Reporting "Total revenue in Q4 was $2.53 billion".
description:
Workday reported its Q4 fiscal 2026 results, highlighting Q4 total revenue of $2.53 billion, representing a growth of 15%. Q4 subscription revenue was $2.36 billion, up 16%. For the full year fiscal 2026, total revenue reached $9.55 billion, up 13%. The company reported a Q4 non-GAAP operating income of $774 million with a non-GAAP operating margin of 30.6%, and full-year free cash flow of $2.78 billion, which was up 27%.

description:

title: Indeed's Pricing Black Box
description:
This week, the gang dives into the corporate chaos defining the start of 2026. The crew pulls no punches on the Workday leadership shakeup, questioning the optics of massive layoffs paired with multimillion-dollar executive payouts as a co-founder returns to the helm for the fourth time.

 While the market panic over AI monetization sends SaaS stocks tumbling, the hosts dissect whether we’re seeing a true tech revolution or just a "knee-jerk" reaction to the high costs of artificial intelligence

title: Episode 454 - Your Weekly TA & Recruitment News with The Scoop
description:
Today on the Scoop, the team from Tapod brings you all of the weekly TA & Recruitment News, including…  the death of the digital nomad… some interesting job data in NZ and globally… trouble at Workday… what’s the most in-demand Tech role?  Grad market update… Tech workers joining the union… Gen Z lying on their job applications and much more. 
Thanks to Indeed for your ongoing support.

title: WDAY Newest "SaaS-pocalypse" Victim, Downgrades Hit Stock After Earnings
description:
Since the start of 2026, Workday (WDAY) shares have fallen 40%. Earnings and a slew of downgrades didn't help the outlook picture, as Marley Kayden runs through the metrics in the report analysts took issue with. Prosper Trading Academy's Scott Bauer rounds out the bearish perspective with a put spread example options trade for Workday.
